programme.desc: The staff become concerned when Jupiter, the rescued sea lion, is not himself. The Ocean Voyager exhibit awaits its new residents.

programme.desc: After eating all his tankmate's food, Tank the hungry sea turtle finds a space to eat in peace. Two beluga whales are welcomed to their new home.

programme.title: The Aquarium: Unfiltered
programme.desc: The team are determined to have Gibson the sea otter pup discover his independence as he separates from his pal, Mara. The African penguins head off-site.

programme.title: The Aquarium: Unfiltered
programme.desc: A sea lion called Finn has tummy trouble and the team feeds him a snack to help them investigate why. Big Mama, the guitarfish, is living up to her name.

programme.title: The Aquarium: Unfiltered
programme.desc: Technology from California is brought to the aquarium to study beluga whales. Maggie the Asian small-clawed otter's uses her training during immunisation.

programme.title: DreamWorks Dragons: Defenders of Berk
programme.desc: When the town's well runs dry, Hiccup and Toothless discover a group of baby Whispering Death dragons living in the tunnels underneath, planted there by Alvin.

programme.title: DreamWorks Dragons: Defenders of Berk
programme.desc: Snotlout is concerned when his dragon's flame goes out and the kids have to figure out how to reignite it before it's too late.

programme.title: DreamWorks Dragons: Defenders of Berk
programme.desc: Once every 10 years, a mysterious glowing dragon visits Berk and this year Hiccup and Astrid are determined to find out where it's coming from - and stop it from reaching the village.

programme.title: Agatha Christie's Poirot
programme.sub-title: The Mystery Of The Spanish Chest
programme.desc: Poirot is asked to protect a woman from her violent husband, but events take a turn when the husband soon becomes the victim of a gruesome murder.

programme.title: The Royal
programme.desc: Mr. Carnegie and Catherine go to the races for their first date; Dr. Ormerod treats a boy twice in the same day.

programme.title: Outnumbered
programme.desc: Ben's fibbing reaches a whole new level as parents at a school football match begin to compliment Dad on his friendship with Gordon Brown and his SAS training.

programme.title: Vera
programme.desc: DCI Vera Stanhope is called to a chilling murder scene when the charred remains of a body are discovered in an abattoir incinerator.

programme.title: Agatha Christie's Marple
programme.desc: An accused murderer dies in jail protesting his innocence, but the real killer could be closer than Miss Marple thinks.

programme.title: Hustle
programme.desc: Danny needs a new grifter, but candidates surprise them. Porn baron Dickie Brennan wants a prize winning horse. Our con artists, despite knowing nothing of horses, will oblige.

programme.title: Whitstable Pearl
programme.desc: A taxi driver is shot dead. An ex-banker avoids an assassin's bullet; Pearl, hired by him, uncovers a surprising connection. Mike gets info for closure on his wife's death.

programme.title: Downton Abbey
programme.desc: Carson complains about Mrs Hughes' housekeeping skills, Mary and Tom open the house to the public to raise funds for the hospital, and Carson questions Thomas about his meetings with Andy.

programme.title: Blandings
programme.desc: Connie encourages Hannibal Didcot to propose to wealthy American Vanessa Polk.

programme.title: The Coroner
programme.desc: When a local journalist tries to convince the people of Lighthaven that there is a big cat on the moors, nobody believes him, until the discovery of his mauled body.

programme.title: Happy Valley
programme.desc: Catherine confronts a delusional Frances, while John's torment leads him to desperate measures.

programme.title: Spooks
programme.desc: The missions of MI5, the UK's domestic intelligence organisation.

programme.title: Vera

programme.title: Agatha Christie's Poirot
programme.desc: During a village's Halloween party, a young girl boasts of having witnessed a murder from years before.

programme.title: Hustle
programme.desc: Grifters' favourite barman, Eddie, is in trouble. His father's nursing home owner holds him ransom. Can Danny devise a decent con, or will the team go bankrupt saving Eddie's dad.

programme.title: Agatha Christie's Poirot
programme.desc: Poirot probes the disappearance of a wealthy woman's cook, and soon uncovers an elaborate plot to hide an even darker crime.

programme.title: Downton Abbey
programme.desc: June, 1925. Isobel receives a wedding invitation, Mary receives a telephone call from Henry, and Mrs Patmore opens her B&B.

programme.title: Knowing Me, Knowing You With Alan Partri
programme.desc: Could this be the end of the road for Alan's chat as he welcomes Hollywood directors Scott and Dean, two lesbian presenters, and restaurant critic and raconteur Forbes McAllister?

programme.title: Ludwig
programme.desc: A cryptic late night call from Holly lures Lucy into danger. Back at the station, all eyes are on John as pressure ramps up. Will his cover finally be blown?

programme.title: Ferris Bueller's Day Off
programme.desc: Larger than life, and blessed with a magical sense of serendipity, Ferris Bueller is a model for all those who take themselves too seriously.

programme.title: Barbarella
programme.desc: In the far future, in a time of way-out, psychedelic spaceships and free love, space agent Barbarella is assigned to stop the evil Durand-Durand and save humanity.

programme.title: The Nutty Professor
programme.desc: An eccentric chemistry professor discovers an elixir which turns him into a pop idol.

programme.title: Junior
programme.desc: You'll never guess who's going to have a baby. Watch as the maternal tables are turned forever when, after taking an experimental drug, a male scientist becomes pregnant.

programme.title: Brewster's Millions
programme.desc: Montgomery Brewster is a minor league baseball pitcher who discovers he has to blow $30 million in 30 days as a condition to inherit a much greater fortune.

programme.title: Beverly Hills Cop II
programme.desc: The hard-nosed Detroit cop returns to Los Angeles to solve another case. This time, he must direct his efforts towards unravelling the Alphabet Crimes, a series of robberies committed by punks.

programme.title: Rambo: First Blood Part II
programme.desc: After a disastrous parachute drop, Rambo is left stranded in the jungles with only his combat knife and bow and arrows to protect him.

programme.title: BOSAI: Science that Can Save Your Life
programme.desc: Find out about Japan's emergency food options that meet the needs of various people. Also discover the rolling stock method, a smart way to stockpile emergency food.

programme.title: Impacts: Climates Change the World
programme.desc: What happens to lake water when it no longer freezes in winter? Detailed records of a "divine" freezing phenomenon of Lake Suwa in Japan have been kept for 580 years, but since 2018 it has not frozen.

programme.title: Time-Lapse Japan
programme.desc: As snow melts in Yonezawa, it provides water used for growing rice. Beautiful time-lapse images show how a 400-year-old brewery turns this rice into sake, using human expertise instead of machines.

programme.title: Newsroom Tokyo
programme.desc: NEWSROOM TOKYO dives deeper into the day's news with insight and analysis, from the perspective of Japan and the rest of Asia. We put a spotlight on what you need to know to understand the issues.

programme.title: Direct Talk
programme.desc: Ichiko Aoba puts distinctive, whispery vocals over floating, classical guitar melodies. We explore why her music captivates listeners around the world, despite being sung in Japanese.

programme.title: Gourmet in the Park
programme.desc: An oasis in the heart of Tokyo with ties to the post-World War II US occupation, this restaurant has shaped Japanese food trends for over 100 years.

programme.title: Ukiyoe EDO-LIFE
programme.desc: We visit a terakoya, a school teaching reading and writing. Today the young students have come dressed in their finest, and are busy putting brush to paper to show off their calligraphy skills.

programme.desc: NHK NEWSLINE brings you up to date with the latest from Japan, Asia and around the world. Our team covers breaking news and major developments, with trusted anchors to tie it all together.

programme.title: Cycle Around Japan
programme.desc: We visit Oita, famous for its hot springs, and meet many warm-hearted people, like a wrangler who entertains visitors with duck races and an artist interacting with locals through her art.

programme.title: NHK Newsline
programme.desc: NHK NEWSLINE brings you up to date with the latest from Japan, Asia and around the world. Our team covers breaking news and major developments, with trusted anchors to tie it all together.

programme.title: History Uncovered
programme.desc: In the 19th century, Japan opened its doors. The "Kimono Dress" - emblematic of a broader clothing revolution - sheds light on Japan's forward-looking strategy as it joined the global community.

programme.title: Cinematic Journey
programme.desc: A scientific trek into Earth's memory. See Anami's ancient strata, the singing sands of Kotobikihama, and the geological time gaps of Uradome's rocks.

programme.title: Ukiyoe EDO-LIFE
programme.desc: We come across a tranquil, snow-covered Edo cityscape. But there's something in the air: the aroma of foods both sweet and savory that helped the townspeople keep warm in the winter.

programme.title: NHK Newsline
programme.desc: NHK NEWSLINE brings you up to date with the latest from Japan, Asia and around the world. Our team covers breaking news and major developments, with trusted anchors to tie it all together.

programme.title: BOSAI
programme.desc: The number of visitors to Japan is rising. However, many do not know what to do during an earthquake, tsunami or typhoon. Find out the technologies being developed to protect visitors from disasters.

programme.title: Design Museum Japan
programme.desc: Tsukamoto Yoshiharu (Architect) visits Nara. Long ago, people in Nara preserved ice by building an icehouse on a mountain ridge, showing how architecture can make use of natural characteristics.

programme.title: NHK WORLD TV Special Program
programme.desc: A selection of acclaimed programs from NHK's domestic channels dubbed into English.

programme.title: NHK Newsline
programme.desc: NHK NEWSLINE brings you up to date with the latest from Japan, Asia and around the world. Our team covers breaking news and major developments, with trusted anchors to tie it all together.

programme.title: NHK World Showcase
programme.desc: NHK WORLD SHOWCASE covers a variety of genres, including special features and pilot episodes of newly-developed programs.

programme.title: NHK Newsline
programme.desc: NHK NEWSLINE brings you up to date with the latest from Japan, Asia and around the world. Our team covers breaking news and major developments, with trusted anchors to tie it all together.

programme.title: J-Melo
programme.desc: Join May J. for great Japanese music! This week, DJ Night Tempo (the driving force behind a worldwide city-pop boom) and up-and-coming indie rock band MEminor are in the studio to chat and perform.

programme.title: Little Charo
programme.desc: Little Charo is an animation series about a Japanese dog who got lost in NY. "I want to see my owner again!" Charo starts his adventure back home. Season 1-8.

programme.title: Japanology Plus Mini
programme.desc: Ueno is home to world-class cultural facilities, a bustling street market, a historic shrine, and much more. We look at some of the many features that make this diverse urban environment so popular.

programme.title: A Cat's-Eye View of Japan
programme.desc: Chichibu is a mountainous region with lots of natural beauty. Cats keep watch over a field of red spider lilies and even guide visitors through the mountains! We also meet a cat who lives at a shrine.

programme.title: NHK Newsline
programme.desc: NHK NEWSLINE brings you up to date with the latest from Japan, Asia and around the world. Our team covers breaking news and major developments, with trusted anchors to tie it all together.

programme.title: Cycle Around Japan
programme.desc: Many now rarely-seen crafts live on in the remote villages of the Kii Mountains. We see aged artisans producing pigment from pine tree soot and crafting traditional wooden buckets and tubs.

programme.title: The Wakey Show
programme.desc: This episode features "Wakey's Door" on the Japanese school backpack randoseru,"Mind and Body Exercise" to move and feel refreshed, and a Comedy Writers skit,"I Lose Things." It energizes kids.

programme.title: NHK Newsline
programme.desc: NHK NEWSLINE brings you up to date with the latest from Japan, Asia and around the world. Our team covers breaking news and major developments, with trusted anchors to tie it all together.

programme.title: The World Heritage Sites in Japan
programme.desc: The brilliant white Himeji Castle is a rare example of a wood castle built without a single nail. With solid battle defenses and beauty preserved by craftsmen, it's a masterpiece of function and form.

programme.title: The Seasons of Yamato
programme.desc: A series of poetic videos by Koichi Hozan, a videographer living in Nara, in collaboration with a pianist, Mine Kawakami, for which she plays exclusive pieces, makes you experience each seasons.

programme.title: Grand Sumo Highlights
programme.desc: NHK WORLD-JAPAN presents a sumo highlights program for fans around the globe. Today the show features all top-division bouts from May 23, Day 14 of the Grand Sumo Tournament in Tokyo.

programme.title: Sumopedia
programme.desc: Sumopedia enriches your sumo experience with information on the techniques, traditions and famous wrestlers of the past. The rules may be simple but there is a lot more to sumo than meets the eye.

programme.title: NHK Newsline
programme.desc: NHK NEWSLINE brings you up to date with the latest from Japan, Asia and around the world. Our team covers breaking news and major developments, with trusted anchors to tie it all together.

programme.title: NHK World Selection
programme.desc: A selection of acclaimed programs from NHK's domestic channels dubbed into English.

programme.title: Core Kyoto Mini
programme.desc: Washi, diverse beauty in everyday life. Dive deep into the ancient capital, still innovative 1,200 years after its foundation.

programme.title: Easy Japanese for Work
programme.desc: Telling passengers in a hurry that they may be late. Accelerate your Japanese language skills! Learn practical, effective workplace expressions, understand business culture and improve your kanji.

programme.title: Zero Waste Life
programme.desc: Substandard fabric from Himei Akira's dye works is now being made into a new composite material. With its wood-grain pattern, it's useful in everything from furniture to small accessories.

programme.title: Pusher
programme.desc: A failed drug deal lands Frank in debt to a ruthless and dangerous Copenhagen drug lord.

programme.title: Pusher 2: With Blood on My Hands
programme.desc: In part two of Danish director Nicolas Winding Refn's crime trilogy, Mads Mikkelsen plays Tonny, a criminal at the mercy of his cold-hearted gangster father.

programme.title: Pusher 3: I'm The Angel of Death
programme.desc: This bloody and captivating film completes Danish director Nicolas Winding Refn's crime trilogy. Copenhagen's biggest kingpin must rethink his status when a younger crowd rolls in.

programme.title: Hardware
programme.desc: In an America ravaged by atomic warfare, nomads spend their days scavenging for scrap. That's how an ex-soldier acquires spare android parts, which turn into a robot programmed to destroy humans.

programme.title: Timecrimes
programme.desc: A man accidentally gets into a time machine and travels back in time nearly an hour. Finding himself will be the first of a series of disasters of unforeseeable consequences.

programme.title: Dobermann
programme.desc: The Dobermann and his gang have been hitting the headlines. Banks, post-offices, bullion vans! The whole works! An anthology of robbery, a compilation of hold-ups!

programme.title: Naked Weapon
programme.desc: A group of girls are kidnapped and trained to become assassins for a criminal organisation, ruled over by the ruthless Madam M.

programme.title: Winnie the Pooh: Blood and Honey
programme.desc: After Christopher Robin abandons them for college, Pooh and Piglet embark on a bloody rampage as they search for a new source of food.

programme.title: Black Robe
programme.desc: In 1634 a Jesuit missionary sets out to convert the tribes in Huron Indian country. A culture-clashing masterpiece from Australian director Bruce Beresford.

programme.title: The Wind
programme.desc: Lizzy is settling a remote stretch of land on the 19th-century American frontier, when she begins to sense a sinister presence that seems to be borne of the land itself.

programme.title: Hellraiser III: Hell on Earth
programme.desc: J.P., a womanising nightclub owner, buys a bizarre, abstract pillar at a mysterious art gallery. Unknowingly, he's purchased the gateway to hell.

programme.title: Dollman vs. Demonic Toys
programme.desc: Judith Grey teams with Brick Bardo (Dollman) and his girlfriend Ginger to face the evil Demonic Toys for one final battle.

programme.title: The Hit
programme.desc: A hit man is sent to Spain to kidnap an ex-criminal and transport him to Paris for execution.

programme.title: You Don't Nomi
programme.desc: Trace Paul Verhoeven's Showgirls' redemptive journey from notorious flop to cult classic, and maybe even masterpiece.

programme.title: The Stunt man
programme.desc: A fugitive stumbles onto a movie set just when they need a new stunt man, takes the job as a way to hide out and falls for the leading lady while facing off with his manipulative director.

programme.title: Severance
programme.desc: A bonding weekend goes horribly wrong for seven colleagues who find themselves facing the chop when they are sabotaged by a deadly enemy. Only the smartest will survive this brutal office outing.

programme.title: Police Story
programme.desc: A kung-fu policeman (Jackie Chan) must protect a female witness (Brigitte Lin) from a Hong Kong drug lord for whom she used to work.

programme.title: Police Story 2
programme.desc: A Hong Kong cop's unusual policing methods result in his demotion to traffic duty, despite his success in fighting crime. Meanwhile, an old enemy is released from prison and sets out to get revenge.

programme.title: Police Story 3: Super Cop
programme.desc: A Hong Kong detective teams up with his female Red Chinese counterpart to stop a Chinese drug czar.

programme.title: Possession
programme.desc: A woman starts exhibiting increasingly disturbing behavior after asking her husband for a divorce. Suspicions of infidelity soon give way to something much more sinister.

programme.title: To Catch A Killer: Part 1
programme.desc: As he investigates the missing person report of a teenager, detective Kozenczak becomes concerned that local businessman John Wayne Gacy may be responsible. However, their evidence is circumstantial.

programme.title: Winnie The Pooh: Blood And Honey 2
programme.desc: Not wanting to live in the shadows any longer, Winnie-the-Pooh, Piglet, Owl and Tigger take their fight to the town of Ashdown, leaving a bloody trail of death and mayhem in their wake.

programme.title: Suspiria
programme.desc: A girl enrols in an upmarket ballet academy, only to realise that the school is a front for something much more sinister and supernatural.

programme.title: Lords of Chaos
programme.desc: The origins of Norwegian Black Metal and a group of young men with a flair for publicity, church-burning...and murder.

programme.title: Hellraiser IV: Bloodline
programme.desc: In the 22nd century, a scientist attempts to right the wrong his ancestor created: the puzzle box that opens the gates of Hell and unleashes Pinhead and his Cenobite legions.

programme.title: Heathers
programme.desc: Veronica meets a James Dean-type newcomer who suggests they kill off the popular kids and end the cruel, unfair treatment the girls impose on unpopular kids at school.

programme.title: The Science of Sleep
programme.desc: A man entranced by his dreams and imagination is love-struck with a French woman and feels he can show her his world.

programme.title: Open Your Eyes
programme.desc: A very handsome gentleman finds the love of his life, but suffers an accident and needs to have his face reconstructed through surgery after being severely disfigured.

programme.title: Come To Daddy
programme.desc: Norval, a privileged man-child travels to the beautiful and remote cabin of his estranged father, in order to reconnect with him as he hasn't seen him in 30 years.

programme.title: District B13: Ultimatum
programme.desc: Explosive sequel set in a futuristic Paris. Corrupt cops conspire to launch a nuclear strike and take over a ghetto terrorised by marauding drug gangs and killers. Subtitles.

programme.title: Color Out Of Space
programme.desc: A family's retreat to rural life quickly crumbles when a meteorite crashes into their front yard. They attempt to battle a nebulous entity that they can barely understand.

programme.title: Infernal Affairs II
programme.desc: In Hong Kong, Chan Wing Yan goes undercover in the triads as Lau Kin Ming joins the police. Both sides face a common threat from a rival crime boss. (Subtitles)

programme.title: Arctic
programme.desc: Sole-survivor of a plane crash, and stranded deep within the Arctic Circle, Overgard is waiting to be rescued, when a sudden turn of events finds him no longer on his own.

programme.title: Children of the Corn II: Final Sacrifice
programme.desc: When the mutilated bodies of adults are found in Nebraska no one believes that the killers could be children hiding in the cornfields. A journalist covering the story delves into the truth.

programme.title: The Raid
programme.desc: A SWAT team is trapped in a tenement run by a ruthless mobster and his army of killers and thugs. Stranded on the sixth floor, they must fight their way through the city's worst to survive.

programme.title: Day of the Dead
programme.desc: The flesh-eating undead have wiped out every last vestige of the civilised world. Deep underground, a group of scientists and soldiers work to find a cure for the unstoppable plague.

programme.title: Amulet
programme.desc: An ex-soldier is offered a place to stay at a decaying house inhabited by a young woman and her dying mother. Falling for her, he suspects something sinister is going on.

programme.title: Society
programme.desc: A Beverly Hills teen (Billy Warlock) discovers his parents are part of a gruesome orgy cult for the social elite.

programme.title: Wasabi
programme.desc: The death of a ex-lover puts a French cop on a collision course with the Yakuza and the daughter he never knew he had.

programme.title: Eaten Alive
programme.desc: Psychotic redneck Judd owns a dilapidated hotel in rural Texas, where he murders people and then feeds their remains to his large pet crocodile in the swamp beside his hotel.

programme.title: Good Boy
programme.desc: Christian, a millionaire heir, meets Sigrid, a young student, on a dating app. They hit it off, but there's only one problem: Christian lives with Frank, a man who dresses up and constantly acts like a dog.

programme.title: The House That Jack Built
programme.desc: USA in the 1970s. We follow the highly intelligent Jack over a span of 12 years and are introduced to the murders that define his development as a serial killer.

programme.title: Under The Silver Lake
programme.desc: Sam, a disenchanted 33-year-old finds a mysterious woman in his apartment's pool. When she vanishes, he embarks on a quest across LA, leading him down a path of mystery.

programme.title: Oasis
programme.desc: An irresponsible and childish ex-con befriends a girl with cerebral palsy and develops a progressively stronger bond with her.

programme.title: House of the Devil
programme.desc: Financially struggling college student Samantha takes a strange babysitting job that coincides with a full lunar eclipse. She slowly realizes her clients harbor a terrifying secret.

programme.title: Memento
programme.desc: A story told both forwards and backwards in time about an ex- insurance investigator, unable to remember new thoughts, who uses notes and tattoos to hunt for the man he thinks killed his wife.

programme.title: Howling VI: The Freaks
programme.desc: A villainous carnival owner traps a young werewolf to include in his growing menagerie of inhuman exhibits.

programme.title: Cypher
programme.desc: Paranoia drives this hi-tech cyber thriller when a computer programmer who turns to corporate espionage is caught in a spiral where even his own identity is put in doubt.

programme.title: Dobermann
programme.desc: The Dobermann and his gang have been hitting the headlines. Banks, post-offices, bullion vans! The whole works! An anthology of robbery, a compilation of hold-ups!

programme.title: Showgirls
programme.desc: Nomi Malone has what it takes to make it as a Las Vegas showgirl - what she doesn't have is a way in. To survive, she accepts the only job available, lap dancing at a seedy club.

programme.title: Re-Animator
programme.desc: A medical student (Jeffrey Combs) brings his headless professor back from the dead with a special serum.

programme.title: The Navigator: A Medieval Odyssey
programme.desc: A young 14th Century boy with acute psychic powers believes that he can rescue his fellow villagers by tunnelling their way through the earth. To their surprise they come out in New Zealand in 1988.

programme.title: Demonic Toys
programme.desc: Two gunrunners and a pregnant policewoman (Tracy Scoggins) are trapped in a warehouse with a bad boy's toys.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles
programme.desc: From their base in the city sewers, turtle heroes Michelangelo, Raphael, Leonardo and Donatello are on a mission to defeat an evil warlord and wipe out crime.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles II
programme.desc: The heroes in a half-shell are back. Our fearsome foursome go after the glowing canister that has slipped into the hands of the evil Shredder and his mutant allies, Rahzar and Tokka.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles III
programme.desc: When a magic sceptre accidentally transports April back through time to 16th-century Japan, the boys take off in hot pursuit, cowabungling their way right out of the sewers.

programme.title: Super Mario Bros.
programme.desc: Two Brooklyn plumbers, Mario and Luigi, must travel to another dimension to rescue a princess from the evil dictator King Koopa and stop him from taking over the world.

programme.title: The Paper Tigers
programme.desc: Three Kung Fu prodigies have grown into washed-up, middle-aged men. But when their master is murdered, they must juggle their dead-end jobs, dad duties, and old grudges to avenge his death.

programme.title: Following
programme.desc: A young London writer follows strangers for inspiration, but his hobby becomes an obsession, leading him further into their lives than he ever intended.

programme.title: The Last Stop in Yuma County
programme.desc: Stranded at an Arizona rest stop, a travelling knife salesman gets thrust into a high-stakes hostage situation by the arrival of two bank robbers who will stop at nothing to protect their ill-begotten fortune.

programme.title: You Were Never Really Here
programme.desc: Joe is a hired gun who rescues trafficked girls, using brutal methods against those responsible.

programme.title: Sympathy For The Devil
programme.desc: After being forced to drive a mysterious passenger at gunpoint, a man finds himself in a high-stakes game of cat and mouse where it becomes clear that not everything is as it seems.

programme.title: I Spit On Your Grave
programme.desc: An aspiring writer is sexually abused and left for dead by four men. She systematically hunts them down to seek revenge, inflicting upon them every horrifying and torturous moment they carried out on her.

programme.title: Border Security: International
programme.desc: Canadian Border Services Officers work on the front lines, intercepting suspicious travellers and contraband from around the world to help keep Canada safe.

programme.title: Border Security: Australia's Front Line
programme.desc: Officers from Home Affairs, Border Force and Quarantine enforce immigration, customs, quarantine and finance laws at Australia's borders.

programme.title: Police Ten 7
programme.desc: Join Rob Lemoto for a closer look at the dramatic working lives of New Zealand's police force and the Kiwis who end up on the wrong side of the law.

programme.title: Highway Patrol
programme.desc: Senior Constable Dean Pickering is on the end of a drunk man's anger when he pulls him over in Nunadwading.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: Featuring police officers in cities across the US, patrolling streets for car thieves, drug pushers, sex-trade workers, violent thugs and anyone else who dares step onto the wrong side of the law.

programme.title: Cops

programme.title: Cops Reloaded
programme.desc: Officers question suspects in relation to a street brawl. A man is driving with a suspended licence. A driver crashes his car after trying to evade the police. A deputy searches for a shoplifter.

programme.title: Cops Reloaded
programme.desc: A high-speed chase ends at the driver's home. An escaped python is loose in the neighbourhood. A registered sex offender tries to lure a young girl. A man is questioned for allegedly selling drugs.

programme.title: Outlander
programme.desc: The growing Regulator threat forces Jamie, Claire and Roger to embark on a mission to raise a militia.

programme.title: Outlander
programme.desc: Roger leads Jamie's militia to the trading post of Brownsville and finds himself in a feud. Jamie and Claire arrive to find that Roger's unusual strategy may have cost them the loyalty of the militia.

programme.title: Outlander
programme.desc: Jamie and his militia arrive at Hillsborough to learn that Governor Tryon has proposed a rather unorthodox solution to deal with the threat posed by the Regulators and to resolve the political crisis.

programme.title: Outlander
programme.desc: At Jocasta's wedding, Jamie learns Tryon's true motivation for ending the Regulator threat.

programme.title: Outlander
programme.desc: The Regulator Rebellion reaches a boiling point, forcing Jamie to face his fear and confront the consequence of his divided loyalties.

programme.title: Outlander
programme.desc: The Frasers must come to terms with all that has changed in the aftermath of the Battle of Alamance Creek. Brianna tries to help Roger overcome the trauma he has endured.

programme.title: Outlander
programme.desc: When Jamie is bitten by a venomous snake, Claire fears she may not have the resources to save him. Jamie asks Roger to complete an important task in the event of his death.

programme.title: Outlander
programme.desc: Jamie and Roger implement their plan to eliminate the threat looming over them, but it goes awry. Brianna is forced to confront her greatest fear and fight for her and her son's lives.

programme.desc: A revelation about Jemmy forces Roger and Brianna to choose between staying in the 18th century, or returning to the safety of the future.
